title: Luscious Juicy Irish Lamb Skewers
description: A Whole30-friendly Irish dish featuring lamb skewers with a mustardy flavor, grilled to perfection on a robata grill with lemongrass stalks.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together Dijon mustard, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the mustard mixture.
Thread a lamb cube, a lemongrass piece, and another lamb cube onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
